steps.title: Locate apatite on the scale
steps.content: The notes place calcite at 3, apatite at 5, and topaz at 8 on the Mohs scale. Since larger numbers mean harder minerals, apatite is between the other two.

steps.title: Compare both other minerals
steps.content: A compares only topaz and calcite, B is too general, and C focuses on topaz's ability to scratch other minerals. The needed statement explains apatite's hardness relative to both calcite and topaz. The answer is D.
